what_was_done: Fixed statusline memory count stuck at stale value (M:4078). Root cause: UDS socket worker down, circuit breaker open, stale cache returned forever. Fix: replaced UDS socket_count() with direct LanceDB count_rows() in get_memory_count(). Count now live at 4106.

last_response_preview:
That confirms it — the live fetch occasionally times out or fails silently (8s timeout), and the fallback is those sparse hardcoded lists. When it works, you get the full catalog.

The fix is simple: the fetch failures are completely silent (`return nil`). Want me to add a log line so you can at least see when it falls back? Something like:

```go
if err != nil {
    log.Printf("[startup] OpenRouter fetch failed: %v", err)
    return nil
}
```

That way next time it shows only 3 models, you'll k
